properties.name: Turuun & Benih
properties.flavorText: Bringing a fruit of the Spindle Tree to the Reka is a way for me to recapture my youth.
properties.effectDesc: When you make a <GIFT> — You may exhaust me ({T}) to also receive it. (A Gift is when on your turn, an opponent draws a card, Resupplies or receives a token.)  Ignore my ability during the first Day.

properties.name: Matz & Hive
properties.flavorText: I am the beating heart of the swarm, the architect of the hive.
properties.effectDesc: (You may keep up to three cards in your Landmarks during Night.)  At Noon — If there are three or more cards in your Landmarks, you may sacrifice one. If you do, play for free a Landmark Permanent with a max Hand Cost of {2} more than the sacrificed card.

properties.name: Sierra & Oddball
properties.effectDesc: When you play a Permanent with Hand Cost {3} or more — You may exhaust me ({T}) to create a <BRASSBUG> Robot token in target Expedition.
properties.flavorText: I don't know if there's a better reward than seeing something you've built come to life.

properties.name: Kojo & Booda
properties.effectDesc: At Noon — if you are the first player, create a <BOODA> Companion token in your Companion Expedition.
properties.flavorText: Faster, ever faster! Our fire rages highest when the race is afoot!

properties.name: Nevenka & Blotch
properties.effectDesc: {T} : Target a Character you control, then roll a die. On a:  • 6+, it gains <ANCHORED>. (During Rest, it doesn't go to Reserve and it loses Anchored.)  • 2-5, it gains 1 boost$<BB>.  • 1, send it to Reserve.
properties.flavorText: Chaos can bring disappointment, sure, but it's also where ye'll find the most wonderfullest hidden gems!

properties.name: Teija & Nauraa
properties.effectDesc: The first Character you play each Afternoon gains 1 boost$<BB>.
properties.flavorText: Nature must be nurtured to fully express its generosity.

properties.name: Sigismar & Wingspan
properties.effectDesc: At Noon — Create an <ORDIS_RECRUIT> Soldier token in your Hero Expedition. Ignore my abilities during the first Day
properties.flavorText: Follow me, friends! If we stand together, nothing can stop us!

properties.flavorText: Whatever ordeals we may face, good manners and politeness are always in fashion!

properties.name: Flore, Caring Gardener
properties.flavorText: Every day that goes by without a Drillmole showing up is a blessing.
properties.supportDesc: {I} At Noon — Another target Character in play or in Reserve gains 1 boost.

properties.name: Ordis Messenger
properties.flavorText: To maintain their cohesion, the Ordis must call on the most reliable of couriers.
properties.effectDesc: #{J}# If I'm in an Ascended Expedition, #create an <AEROLITH> token in target player's Landmarks.# Otherwise, my Expedition <ASCENDS>.

properties.name: Caladrius
properties.flavorText: With a simple glance, it reveals your destination.
properties.effectDesc: {H} You may send to Reserve target Character with #Hand Cost {1}# or less.

properties.name: Persephone
properties.flavorText: After every winter must come spring.
properties.effectDesc: My region #and the region of the Expedition facing me# are {V} #and lose their other types.#

properties.name: Burrowing Noosh
properties.flavorText: It takes years for roots to punch their way through the hardest stone, but for them it only takes a few hours.

properties.name: Bumblebeet
properties.flavorText: On the surface, pollination by bumblebeets is a key tool in growing Muna crops.
properties.supportDesc: {I} At Noon — I gain 1 boost, up to a max of 2.

properties.name: Bumblebeet
properties.flavorText: On the surface, pollination by bumblebeets is a key tool in growing Muna crops.
properties.effectDesc: #{R} I gain <ANCHORED>.#
properties.supportDesc: {I} At Noon — I gain 1 boost, up to a max of 2.

properties.name: Muna Caregiver
properties.flavorText: "We don’t inherit the earth from our ancestors, we borrow it from our children."
properties.supportDesc: {D} : Target Character with Hand Cost {3} or less gains <ANCHORED>. (Discard me from Reserve to do this.)

properties.name: Spindle Harvesters
properties.effectDesc: {J} I gain $<ANCHORED>.
properties.flavorText: Some say the harvesters are the caretakers of the world-trees.

properties.name: Spindle Harvesters
properties.flavorText: Some say the harvesters are the caretakers of the world-trees.
properties.effectDesc: {J} I gain $<ANCHORED>.  #At Noon — if I have 2 or more boosts, $<RESUPPLY>.#

properties.name: Resentful Robin
properties.flavorText: Despite their small size, Rhodopean robins will defend their territory with beak and claw.
properties.effectDesc: {J} If I'm facing a Character, I gain 1 boost.

properties.name: Resentful Robin
properties.flavorText: Despite their small size, Rhodopean robins will defend their territory with beak and claw.
properties.effectDesc: {J} If I'm facing a Character, I gain 1 boost.  #{R} My Expedition <ASCENDS>.#

properties.name: The Ugly Duckling
properties.flavorText: This young recruit swans about while proudly showing off his insignia.
properties.effectDesc: #{J} You may pay {1}. If you do, I gain 1 boost and my Expedition <ASCENDS>.#

properties.name: Jack Frost
properties.flavorText: Another holiday... Just the icing on the cake!
properties.effectDesc: #{J}# You may exhaust ({T}) target card in Reserve. (Exhausted cards can't be played and have no Support abilities.)

properties.name: Snoozer Shroom
properties.effectDesc: #{H} You may pay {2}. If you do, target Character in the Expedition facing me gains <ASLEEP>.#

properties.name: Persephone
properties.flavorText: After every winter must come spring.
properties.effectDesc: My region is {V} in addition to its other types.

properties.name: Fair Fox
properties.flavorText: Should we practice our passing now?
properties.effectDesc: {H} #You may pay {1} to discard target Permanent with Hand Cost {2} or less.# If you do, its controller <RESUPPLIES>.

properties.name: Pasiphaë
properties.flavorText: She won't let herself be bullied.
properties.effectDesc: {J} I gain 1 boost per Character target opponent controls.

properties.name: Helpful Pelican
properties.flavorText: It's not unusual to see these pelicans ferrying small local creatures from one island to the next.

properties.name: Helpful Pelican
effectDesc: When I leave the Expedition zone —
Create a <WOOLLYBACK> Animal token in target opponent's Companion Expedition, then draw a card.

properties.name: Migratory Crane
properties.flavorText: When the cranes start their migration, that's the signal that it's time to seek out new horizons.
properties.effectDesc: When a Character joins the Expedition facing me — You may have me switch Expeditions.

properties.name: Drowsy Dodo
properties.flavorText: After all that work, it's time for the dodo to go night-night.
properties.effectDesc: {J} I gain <ASLEEP>. (During Dusk, ignore my statistics. During Rest, I don't go to Reserve and I lose Asleep.)  When a Character joins the Expedition facing me — You may have me lose <ASLEEP>.

properties.name: Pan
properties.flavorText: He's definitely the black sheep around here!
properties.effectDesc: {H} <SABOTAGE>. If you discarded a card this way, create a <WOOLLYBACK> Animal token in the Companion Expedition of its owner. (Sabotage means to discard up to one card from any Reserve.)

properties.name: Pan
properties.flavorText: He's definitely the black sheep around here!

Create an <AEROLITH> token in your Landmarks.

properties.name: Ascended Trooper
properties.flavorText: After months of expeditions, Aedyt felt she had finally spread her wings.
properties.effectDesc: #{J}# If I'm in an Ascended Expedition, I gain 1 boost. Otherwise, my Expedition <ASCENDS>.

properties.name: Gargoyle
properties.flavorText: At the slightest sign of intrusion, these stone lookouts come to life and sound the alarm.
properties.effectDesc: #{J}# Target Expedition <ASCENDS>.

properties.name: Muna Botanist
properties.effectDesc: {H} Target opponent #<EXHAUSTED_RESUPPLIES>.#  {H} You may target another Character with Base Cost {3} or less, it gains <ANCHORED>. (Its Base Cost is its Reserve Cost if it's Fleeting, or its Hand Cost if not.)

properties.name: Helpful Diver
properties.flavorText: "Ready for a shot of adrenaline?"
properties.effectDesc: {J} You may <RUSH>. If you don't, target opponent <EXHAUSTED_RESUPPLIES>. (Rush means playing another card immediately.)

properties.name: Pinocchio
effectDesc: Draw a card, then put a card from your hand in Reserve.
supportDesc: Pay {1} less for the next card you play this turn, down to a minimum of {1}.

properties.name: Harry Houdini
properties.flavorText: The secret of illusion lies in misdirection.
properties.effectDesc: {H} Create a <MANA_MOTH> Illusion token in an opponent's Expedition, then draw a card.

properties.name: Will-o'-the-Wisp
properties.flavorText: "Nine fathom deep he had followed us - From the land of mist and snow."
properties.effectDesc: If the Expedition facing me is in #{V}#, it can only move forward due to #{V}#.
properties.supportDesc: {D} : The next card you play this turn costs {1} less. (Discard me from Reserve to do this.)

properties.name: Talarian Skater
properties.flavorText: To explore the City, adventurers need daily deliveries from the surface.
properties.effectDesc: $<SCOUT_1> {1}.  {J} Target Character in play #or in Reserve# gains 1 boost.

properties.name: Daughter of Yggdrasil
properties.flavorText: The children of Yggdrasil now take care of the world trees.
properties.effectDesc: {H} #Each player# draws a card.

properties.name: Aloe Vera
properties.flavorText: Moisturizing every day is essential.
properties.effectDesc: #{J} You may pay {1} to have me gain $<ANCHORED>.#  At Noon — $<RESUPPLY>.

properties.name: Daikokuten
properties.flavorText: If you never take a risk, you'll never be rewarded.
properties.effectDesc: {J} Target opponent may immediately play a #card with Base Cost {4} or more# for free. (Reserve Cost if from Reserve, Hand Cost otherwise.)

properties.name: Colorful Cuckoo
properties.flavorText: Even the shyest become a bit less reserved when they hear its song.
properties.effectDesc: {J} I gain $<ANCHORED>.  When a Character joins the Expedition facing me — I gain 1 boost.

properties.flavorText: With their fluffy texture and cotton-candy flavor, woollybacks are wyverns' favorite prey.
properties.effectDesc: {H} You may send to Reserve #up to two# target Characters with Hand Cost {1} or less.

properties.name: Zaratan, Social Leviathan

properties.name: Sow
properties.flavorText: The wise gardener prepares ahead of spring.

properties.supportDesc: {D} : #Target Character with Hand Cost {3} or less gains <ANCHORED>.# (Discard me from Reserve to do this.)

properties.name: A Cappella Training
properties.flavorText: Thank you for being my metronome!
properties.effectDesc: Target Character gains <FLEETING_CHAR>. (If it would be sent to Reserve, discard it instead.)

properties.name: Beauty Sleep

properties.flavorText: Yet beware of splinters of flax.

properties.flavorText: A Zephyr feather gives the Ordis the ability to fly.

properties.effectDesc: <FLEETING>.  If an opponent controls three or more Characters, I cost #{2} less.#  Send target Character to Reserve.

properties.name: Fair Fox
properties.flavorText: Should we practice our passing now?
properties.effectDesc: {H} #You may pay {1} to discard target Permanent with Hand Cost {2} or less.# If you do, its controller <RESUPPLIES>.

properties.name: Pinocchio
effectDesc: Draw a card, then put a card from your hand in Reserve.
supportDesc: Pay {1} less for the next card you play this turn, down to a minimum of {1}.

properties.name: Bravos Tracer
properties.effectDesc: {J} I gain <FLEETING_CHAR>. (If I would be sent to Reserve, discard me instead.)
properties.flavorText: "I only feel alive when I hear the wind whistling in my ears."

properties.name: Issun-bōshi
properties.supportDesc: {D} : The next Character you play this turn gains 1 boost. (Discard me from Reserve to do this.)
properties.flavorText: Small stature, big heart, immense adventures.

properties.name: Kappa
properties.flavorText: "Push through the pain. Giving up would hurt far more."

properties.name: Booda
properties.effectDesc: (If I leave the Expedition zone, remove me from the game.)
properties.flavorText: A Hero can practice Alteration through their Companion, no matter the distance between them.

properties.name: Kojo & Booda
properties.effectDesc: At Noon — if you are the first player, create a <BOODA> Companion token in your Companion Expedition.
properties.flavorText: Faster, ever faster! Our fire rages highest when the race is afoot!

data.log: You draw ${card_names} from your deck (${card_name2}'s effect)

properties.name: Kauri & Puff
properties.flavorText: The language of nature has no use for words
properties.effectDesc: At Noon — If you are first player, create a <WOOLLYBACK> Animal token in target opponent's Companion Expedition, then draw a card.
